member.name: M:JellyfinMasonry.Api.MasonryController.GetRatios(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get cached aspect ratios for a library. Returns { "itemId": ratio, ... }

member.name: M:JellyfinMasonry.Api.MasonryController.LookupRatios(JellyfinMasonry.Api.RatioLookupRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get cached aspect ratios for a specific subset of items.

member.name: M:JellyfinMasonry.Api.MasonryController.LookupLayout(JellyfinMasonry.Api.RatioLookupRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get precomputed layout metadata for a specific subset of items.

member.name: M:JellyfinMasonry.Api.MasonryController.RefreshRatios(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Force refresh cache for a specific library.

member.name: M:JellyfinMasonry.Api.MasonryController.RefreshAllRatios(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Force refresh cache for all libraries.
